body: In the function `Var.weighted_average_lat`, if latitudes is in `Float32` and there are `NaN`s in the data, then eventually the computation being done is `Vector{Real}` times `Vector{Float32}` which gives `Vector{Real}`. Then, `nanmean` is computed on this vector, but throw an error since there is no function defined for that type.
title: Fix Var.weighted_average_lat bug with NaN and FT32
